calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Carolyn Morris, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a national banking association.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of Declarations in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Abdol Tabarsi aka Abdol H. Tabarsi, ind. and dba. Falcon Motors as follows:
Damages $57,337.57
Prejudgment Interest $9,435.56
Attorney's Fees $1,274.00
Costs $697.00, for a total of $68,744.13
Judgment signed in open court.
